name: optima-onboarding
description: Optima HR onboarding web app — schema-driven forms, candidate-centric data, role-based access provisioning

scripts.seed:config: node -e "import('./src/db.js').then(async ({db}) => { await db.init(); const m = await import('./src/seed.js'); m.seedConfig(); await db.flush(); process.exit(0); })"
scripts.seed:new-hires: node -e "import('./src/db.js').then(async ({db}) => { await db.init(); const m = await import('./src/seed.js'); m.seedNewHires(); await db.flush(); process.exit(0); })"
